zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail於1540年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail28歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail28歲。他於1572年4月25日與Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail在蘇格蘭洛-爾雷卡斯特爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年6月14日在蘇格蘭洛-爾雷卡斯特爾享年54歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾波奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail于1540年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail28岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail28岁。他于1572年4月25日与Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail在苏格兰洛-爾雷卡斯特爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年6月14日在苏格兰洛-爾雷卡斯特爾享年54岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾波奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Colin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Diminutive form of the medieval name Col(le), a short form of Nicholas . The medieval name died out after the 14th century. In the 19th century Colin was reintroduced to England from Scotland, where it is an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Cailean, particularly favoured among the Campbells and the MacKenzies, which relates to St Columba ( see Callum ) as Crìsdean does to Christ and Moirean to Mary.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail was born in 1540, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, was 28. He married Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail on 25 April 1572, in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 June 1594, in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail est né en 1540, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail le 25 avril 1572, à Redcastle, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1594, à Redcastle, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Beauly, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail 1540 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail 28. Er hat am 25. April 1572 in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1594 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail è nato il nel 1540 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail il 25 aprile 1572, nel Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 giugno 1594, nel Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintailが1540年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintailは28歳，母Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintailは28歳であった。1572年4月25日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアレドカストルでBarbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年6月14日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアレドカストルで54歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアビーウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail(이)가 1540년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1572년 4월 25일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 레드카스틀에서 Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 6월 14일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 레드카스틀에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 보리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail nasceu em 1540, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail em 25 de abril de 1572, em Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1594, em Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail родился в 1540 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail 25 апреля 1572 г. в местности редкастл, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 июня 1594 г. в местности редкастл, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности болы, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Colin - Cam Mackenzie 11th of Kintail nació en 1540, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Barbara Grant Lady of Freuchie - Baroness of Kintail el 25 de abril de 1572, en Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de junio de 1594, en Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
